summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification. No shared canonical was selected. Security-sensitive refs are quarantined; unrelated non-security PRs are kept open as independent inventory items because the artifact does not establish duplicate, superseded, low-signal, or fixed-by-candidate closeout grounds.

actions.reason: Distinct non-security feature PR; keep open for normal review/proof rather than close in inventory cleanup.
Independent Android feature PR with review follow-up outstanding; no close-style action is justified.
Security-boundary-shaped ACP delivery work is out of scope for PR inventory cleanup; route this PR to central OpenClaw security handling.
Independent broad feature/fix PR with failing checks; keep open for normal author/maintainer follow-up rather than inventory closeout.
Distinct non-security bugfix PR with review/check blockers; keep independent.
Plugin ACP runtime expansion touches trust/security boundary concerns and must be handled by central OpenClaw security review, not PR inventory cleanup.
Independent gateway attribution feature PR; keep open for normal review/merge process.
Distinct configuration/availability PR with proof blocker; keep independent.
Independent ACP session-state bugfix PR with proof/check blocker; keep open.
Trusted sender provenance crosses security-boundary-shaped behavior; route this PR out of ProjectClownfish cleanup.
Open security-sensitive linked issue must be quarantined to central OpenClaw security handling.
